message:
fix(export-html): exclude skill injections from message counts

The counting loop iterated over raw_messages which includes skill
injection messages (role "user") that get dropped by skill filtering.
This inflated the prompt count by ~3 (the number of skill injections).

Now applies the same 5 skill-detection checks in the counting loop
when !include_skills, so counts match what's actually rendered.

Before: 52 prompts (includes 3 skill injections)
After:  49 prompts (accurate)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
